description: Run 3: Re-analysis of Eclipse 2025 commits. Promoted Java 19+ deprecation patterns (Locale.of, Thread.threadId) from YELLOW to GREEN. Added hint-only URL deprecation rule. Created new java19-deprecations.sandbox-hint.

gapsResolved.description: Java 21 deprecation commit was YELLOW but contains only simple 1:1 replacements (Locale.of, Thread.threadId). Promoted to GREEN.
gapsResolved.resolution: Updated evaluation from YELLOW/canImplement=false to GREEN/canImplement=true with DSL rules

gapsResolved.description: No hint file existed for Locale.of() and Thread.threadId() Java 19+ deprecation patterns
gapsResolved.resolution: Created java19-deprecations.sandbox-hint with 4 rules (3 Locale.of variants + Thread.threadId)

gapsResolved.description: URL constructor deprecation (Java 20+) had no hint-only rule
gapsResolved.resolution: Added hint-only rule to deprecated-api.sandbox-hint with exception semantics warning

gapsResolved.description: eclipse-api-context.md lacked specific Locale.of() and Thread.threadId() code examples with Java version details
gapsResolved.resolution: Added Java 19+ Deprecation Patterns section with code examples for both patterns

gapsResolved.description: mining-examples.md lacked GREEN example for multi-pattern deprecation commits and guidance on Java version disambiguation
gapsResolved.resolution: Added Example 19 (GREEN - Java 19+ deprecation) and Example 20 (YELLOW - URL deprecation) plus 2 new Common Mistakes entries (#13-#14)

remainingGaps.description: Several YELLOW commits could potentially become GREEN with DSL extensions

candidates.blocker: Requires constant lookup mapping (system property name → API constant)

discoveredRules.description: Replace deprecated Locale(String) constructor with Locale.of(String)
Replace deprecated Locale(String,String) constructor with Locale.of(String,String)
Replace deprecated Locale(String,String,String) constructor with Locale.of(String,String,String)

promptResources: Updated eclipse-api-context.md with Java 19+ deprecation details (Locale.of, Thread.threadId) including code examples
Added 2 new mining examples (Example 19: GREEN Java 19+ deprecation, Example 20: YELLOW URL deprecation)
Added 2 new Common Mistakes entries (#13: Java version disambiguation, #14: multi-pattern commit classification)
hintFiles: Created java19-deprecations.sandbox-hint with 4 rules: Locale.of (1-arg, 2-arg, 3-arg) + Thread.threadId
Added URL deprecation hint-only rule to deprecated-api.sandbox-hint
evaluations: Corrected aede34103616 from YELLOW to GREEN with canImplementInCurrentDsl=true
Updated 6361505f with targetHintFile reference to deprecated-api.sandbox-hint
nextSteps: Run with Gemini API key to validate improvements lead to better DSL rules
Focus on URL deprecation: consider adding an exception-aware guard to promote from hint-only to auto-fix
Consider adding system property name → constant mapping for ce67be20 commit pattern
